name: langchain-taiga
summary: Python toolkit that lets your LangChain agents automate Taiga: create, search, edit & comment on user stories, tasks and issues via the official REST API. v2 introduces the multi-tenant remote MCP mode (HTTP+OAuth) alongside the existing stdio transport. v2.5+ adds OAuth refresh-token rotation with reuse-detection and attachment read/write tools (list, get, and inline-base64 upload of local files).
